sglang.title: Added the ability to Modify the Context Length
sglang.author: psych0v0yager
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes issue #159
You can now specify how much context you want the model to have.
For example Mixtral 8x7b AWQ:
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path /path/to/bagel_mixtral_AWQ --port 30000 --tp 2
Rank 1: max_total_num_token=135505, max_prefill_num_token=32768, context_len=32768, model_mode=[]

vllm.title: [FIX] Fix beam search test
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Revert a change in #2869 that causes beam search test to fail.

vllm.title: Make vLLM logging formatting optional
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We add an env var to make logging formatting changes done by vLLM optional for better integration into existing systems that may have their own logging formats.

vllm.title: Add metrics to RequestOutput
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adds some extra metrics to RequestOutput which can be used for third party logging/metrics.
